title: valeriana olitoria
intro: Valeriana olitoria, also known as wild valerian or garden heliotrope, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the family Valerianaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Valeriana olitoria include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as pain relief and improved sleep quality. Valeriana olitoria can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
